title: Sibba Dusting Mitt Gloves Microfiber Auto Household Cleaning Mittens Cloth Reusable Washable Gloves for Men Women Kitchen House Blinds Plants Mirrors Lamps Car Cleaning (Dark Green)
features: 【Scratch Free Dusting Gloves】Sibba plant dusting gloves are made of quality microfiber coral fleece material, soft material and fine workmanship,and won't leave scratches. Sibba dusting gloves allow the small dust particles to stay on the gloves quickly and easily, and without felling to the floor. Wet and dry use properties make cleaning more effective, bring convenience to your life.

【Skin-Friendly & Reusable】Our microfiber hand mitt is easy to wash and clean, The skin-friendly properties of cleaning gloves is a crucial consideration, Sibba cleaning mitten and gloves are friendly to our skin,thick and breathable give hands more protection and care, without feeling stuffy and inflexible.

【Effectively Cleaning】Sibba reusable gloves for kitchen and house is convenient and can help you save time, great for your daily cleaning routine, also help you clean your car inside and out, and they are useful and thoughtful gifts on the housewarming.

【One Size Fit Most】Sibba cleaning mittens are elastic, one size fits most people, glove length 21cm, width 13cm, middle finger length 7cm, meet your needs no matter men or women. Shape of five-finger gloves comfortable to wear, they are nice helper for your daily housewor.

【Household Mittens for Most Cleaning Activities】Sibba cleaning mitt can apply dusting mitt to a variety of items, not easy to be lint-free, non-abrasive, suitable for blinds, screens, plant leaves, TV screens, furniture, dishwasher, car, knick-knacks, or other kitchen house cleaning, and some hard-to-reach corners, etc.
